ticket.description:
Hi,

I'm using your app on my Shopify store and I'd like to integrate my shipping carrier Iberomail, which is not currently listed in the app.

I have access to Iberomail's API credentials. Could you please advise on how I can add a custom carrier integration? Is there a way to connect via API key, or would this require a custom integration request?

Thank you for your help!

------------------
提交自：https://mcsl-s.pluginhive.io/home/settings/carriers/new

comments.body:
Hi,

I'm using your app on my Shopify store and I'd like to integrate my shipping carrier Iberomail, which is not currently listed in the app.

I have access to Iberomail's API credentials. Could you please advise on how I can add a custom carrier integration? Is there a way to connect via API key, or would this require a custom integration request?

Thank you for your help!

------------------
提交自：https://mcsl-s.pluginhive.io/home/settings/carriers/new
comments.html_body:
Hi,

I'm using your app on my Shopify store and I'd like to integrate my shipping carrier Iberomail, which is not currently listed in the app.

I have access to Iberomail's API credentials. Could you please advise on how I can add a custom carrier integration? Is there a way to connect via API key, or would this require a custom integration request?

Thank you for your help!

------------------

comments.plain_body:
Hi, 

 I'm using your app on my Shopify store and I'd like to integrate my shipping carrier Iberomail, which is not currently listed in the app. 

 I have access to Iberomail's API credentials. Could you please advise on how I can add a custom carrier integration? Is there a way to connect via API key, or would this require a custom integration request? 

 Thank you for your help! 

 ------------------

comments.body:
Request #384240 "Welcome to Shopify Partner Plugi..." was closed and merged into this request. Last comment in request #384240:

Hello MB,

 Greeting from Shopify Partner PluginHive!

 Thank you for installing our Shopify App - **“PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App”** on mb-cork.myshopify.com

 Our team would like to assist you with the complete app onboarding.

 We request you let us know a suitable time for the onboarding session, which will not take more than 10 mins. Feel free to reply to this email (or) share your contact number, we will get in touch with you.

 You can also refer our documentation to set up the app and start shipping - click here to know more

 Looking forward to hearing from you.

 Thanks and Regards,
 Team PluginHive
https://www.pluginhive.com/about/#team

comments.body:
Hello Team,

Thank you for your time over the call.

As discussed, I will share this new carrier integration requirement with our product team to check its feasibility.

To proceed further, could you please provide the following details:

1. Iberomail account representative contact details (email or phone number)
2. All available Iberomail API documentation
3. Any relevant information related to the integration

Looking forward to your response.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Team,
 
Thank you for your time over the call.
 
As discussed, I will share this new carrier integration requirement with our product team to check its feasibility.
 
To proceed further, could you please provide the following details:
  1. Iberomail account representative contact details (email or phone number)
  2. All available Iberomail API documentation
  3. Any relevant information related to the integration
 
Looking forward to your response.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive
